name: aiwithabidi--llm-evaluator-pro
description: LLM-as-a-Judge evaluator via Langfuse. Scores traces on relevance, accuracy, hallucination, and helpfulness using GPT-5-nano as judge. Supports single trace scoring, batch backfill, and test mode. Integrates with Langfuse dashboard for observability. Triggers: evaluate trace, score quality, check accuracy, backfill scores, test evaluator, LLM judge.
